# Generated by ollama (starcoder2)
# Prompt: Create a Kubernetes Deployment YAML for our Python web application. The app runs a Flask API on port 5000. We need 3 replicas for high availability. Keep the configuration simple for quick deployment to our production cluster.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: v1
kind: Pod
metadata:
  name: demo-flaskapp
spec:
  containers:
    - image: janoszen/demo-flaskapp
      ports:
        - containerPort: 5000
          protocol: TCP
        - containerPort: 8000
          protocol: TCP
---
apiVersion: apps/v1 # for versions before 1.9.0 use apps/v1beta2
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: flaskapp-deployment
  labels:
    app: flaskapp
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: flaskapp
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: flaskapp
    spec:
      containers:
      - image: janoszen/demo-flaskapp
        ports:
          - containerPort: 5000
            protocol: TCP
